chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 36 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on MA No.4641/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 09.10.2023 None present. No intimation is received. Accordingly, this transfer application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
